abort.not_wibeee_device: Discovered device is not a WiBeee energy monitor
abort.wrong_device: The device at this address has a different MAC address than the one being reconfigured

error.auto_configure_failed: Failed to auto-configure the device for Local Push. You can configure it manually via the device web interface.
error.no_device_info: Could not connect to the WiBeee device. Verify the IP address and that the device is powered on.

data_description.auto_configure: If enabled, the integration will automatically configure your WiBeee to send data to this Home Assistant instance (IP and HTTP port). The device will restart to apply changes.
data_description.update_mode: **Local Push** (recommended): The device sends data to Home Assistant in real time (faster, lower latency). **Polling**: Home Assistant periodically asks the device for data (simple, no device changes needed).

mode.description: Choose how the integration receives data from the device.
mode.title: Update mode

data_description.host: Enter the new IP address of your WiBeee device.

reconfigure.description: Update the IP address of your WiBeee energy monitor.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure WiBeee device

data_description.host: The IP address of your WiBeee energy monitor.

user.description: Enter the IP address of your WiBeee energy monitor. Make sure the device has a static IP or DHCP reservation.
user.title: Add WiBeee device

error.auto_configure_failed: Failed to auto-configure the device for Local Push. You can configure it manually via the device web interface.

data_description.auto_configure: Automatically configure the WiBeee to send data to this Home Assistant instance.
data_description.update_mode: **Local Push** (recommended): Device sends data to HA in real time. **Polling**: Periodically fetch data.
